description: Academic writing: essays, papers, literature reviews, thesis sections, abstracts

slots.hint: What academic task — argument, summary, analysis, literature review?
What is the specific topic or research question?
Who is the reader — professor, peer reviewer, general academic audience?
What academic level — undergrad, masters, PhD, journal?
Any specific sources, citations, or frameworks to include?
Style guide, formatting, or assignment constraints?
Any example passages or style you want to emulate?
